title: Colored Screens
description: A Resource Pack that changes some blocks to different colored green screens.
body:
![Colored Screens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d560621410a4eb1d3e31ae6e92596c2ac1b7d5cd.png)
### This Resource Pack changes the Texture of different Light Blocks to different colors of Green Screens.

<details>
<summary>Preview</summary>

- All the Screens
> ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caad5b31d0c2f1777e393d9d3a4a85acc314dc89.png)
 _The block at the top is the vanilla block on the bottom you see its equivalent Colored Screen_

</details>

_all the blocks subject to the change have their name changed to `<color|colour> Screen`, so use that name to search for the Colored Screen that you need_

> This Resource Pack is also included in the [Pengwingly Customized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pengwingly-customized) ModPack if you want to check it out with something more.
